name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers car title loans and secured flex lines of credit with same-day funding, accepting most credit types by using your vehicle title as collateral.
description_long:
TitleMax is one of the largest title lending companies in the United States, with the Memphis Summer Avenue location having served the greater Memphis area since February 2007. The company operates brick-and-mortar stores across multiple states, with this location situated at 3190 Summer Avenue — one mile west of Highland Street — offering in-person service Monday through Saturday with bilingual staff available.

The company's core product is the car title pledge: a short-term secured loan where the borrower's vehicle title serves as collateral. Alongside this, the Summer Avenue location offers a Flex Line of Credit — a revolving secured credit line that allows customers to draw funds as needed up to their credit limit rather than taking a lump sum. TitleMax also provides unsecured flexible lines of credit, available both in-store and online for residents of ten qualifying states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI). All products advertise same-day cash and quick approval.

What distinguishes TitleMax from unsecured payday lenders is the vehicle-collateral model: because your car title backs the loan, the company accepts most credit types and does not rely solely on credit score for approval. The flex line of credit structure also provides more flexibility than a single-disbursement title loan, letting borrowers withdraw incrementally. The Memphis location holds a 5.00/5 average rating across more than 481 Google reviews, with customers frequently citing specific staff members by name for professionalism and helpfulness.

Honestly, title lending is a high-cost borrowing product. TitleMax does not publish APR ranges on its store pages, which makes direct cost comparison difficult before applying. The core risk is vehicle repossession — borrowers who default can lose their car, which may be their primary means of transportation and employment. The model is designed for speed and accessibility, not affordability, and should be evaluated carefully against alternatives such as credit union payday alternative loans or employer advances before committing.
address: 1499 Peachtree Rd Ste B, Balch Springs, TX 75180

company_info.headquarters: 1499 Peachtree Rd Ste B, Balch Springs, TX 75180

pros: Most credit types accepted — vehicle title compensates for weak credit score
Flex line of credit allows partial withdrawals over time rather than one lump sum
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle during the loan term
Bilingual staff available at this location
Unsecured line of credit option available — no collateral required
Established presence since February 2007 with 481+ Google reviews averaging 5.00/5
cons: No APR or rate information disclosed on the store page — costs unknown before applying
Vehicle repossession is the consequence of default on title loans
Requires a clear vehicle title (no existing liens) to qualify for title pledge products
Online unsecured loans restricted to 10 states — not available nationwide
Closed Sundays — no weekend emergency access on the one day many borrowers are free
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or no credit who need cash the same day
Borrowers who have been denied unsecured personal loans or payday alternatives
Tennessee residents who want a revolving credit line rather than a single lump-sum loan
People in Memphis who prefer in-person service with bilingual staff
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners with damaged or limited credit who need cash immediately and have exhausted lower-cost options. The main caveat is cost transparency — rates are not published upfront, and the title pledge model carries real repossession risk if the borrower cannot repay on schedule.
